title: Dense Bi-Encoder Retrieval and Domain Transfer
description: A semantic search prototype embeds queries and documents identically without checking model instructions, returns top five from a large corpus, and has never tested domain or language transfer. Learners cumulatively produce dense retrieval candidate service through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Separate offline document encoding from online query encoding while preserving one versioned bi-encoder space.
Apply model-specific query and document prompts, prefixes, normalization, and maximum-length behavior.
Tune candidate depth from recall and downstream reranking evidence rather than context-window size.
